'''Zeev''' was a [[duuvhal]] and the first pet of Force adept [[Valara Saar]]. Zeev's sex is unknown.

==Biography==
It is unclear how Valara first met Zeev, but it is known that it was before the ''[[Pathfinder III]]'' made a first-contact with her world of [[Yashuvhu/Legends|Yashuvhu]] on [[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]].

A green-feathered reptilian predator, Zeev was apparently trained as a companion by Valara. Valara also taught Zeev to bite on command, which can be dangerous due to the venomous bite of a Duuvhal - this is dangerous enough to kill a Human being.

Valara took Zeev with her when she left Yashuvhu with the ''Pathfinder III'', trying first to become a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] and then just a Force adept wanderer through the galaxy. Zeev became the only Duuvhal seen by the galaxy outside Yashuvhu.

Zeev was with Valara in countless adventures, until it finally met a violent demise on [[Aargau/Legends|Aargau]].

After that moment, Valara returned to Yashuvhu, where she took a second Duuvhal pet called [[Jedi (duuvhal)|Jedi]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic II: Refugee]]'' {{Mo}}
